design_philosophy: Authoritative, clear, and function-first. The design leverages tight grids, stark contrasts, and absolute minimalism to let the data shine. Minimal use of color; color is strictly functional, used for signaling priority and data hierarchy. It feels professional and data-dense for marketers targeting South America.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: The 'Control Room' Grid - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6).
layout_and_spacing.shadows: None. Use sharp borders for definition instead of soft shadows (Swiss Brutalism).

cards.style: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Flat white background, 1px subtle border, no shadow. Content aligned left.
cards.hover_state: Slight background tint shift to #F4F4F5. No translation or lifting.

buttons.primary: Solid dark background (primary), white text, rounded-none, uppercase tracking-wide font-medium. Hover: slightly lighter dark grey.
buttons.secondary: Outline button with 1px border. Background transparent, text primary color. Hover: background #F4F4F5.

tables.style: Dense, full-width. Sticky headers with a hard bottom border. Minimal padding inside cells (px-4 py-3). Hover effects on rows. Use monospace font for numeric columns (Priority Score).

tags_chips.style: Used for 'Puntos de Dolor' (Pain Points) and 'Intención Comercial'. Solid muted background with dark text, or thin outline. Border radius rounded-full for visual contrast against the sharp cards.

navigation.style: Solid background, sticky top, with a hard bottom border. Logo/App Title on left, actions ('Ejecutar Investigación') on right.

motion.transitions: Fast and purposeful. 150ms ease-in-out for hover states.
motion.page_load: Staggered fade-in and slight slide-up (translate-y-2 to 0) for dashboard widgets.

icons.style: Regular or Bold weight, monolinear, clean to match the functional Swiss style.

image_urls.description: Abstract geometric Swiss design background for the top header section. Very light opacity, used to give texture to the main dashboard container.
Abstract South America map background for the regional overview widget. Gives a data-driven enterprise look to the country selection panel.

instructions_to_main_agent: MUST USE LATIN AMERICAN SPANISH for all UI text (e.g., 'Resumen Ejecutivo', 'Ejecutar Investigación', 'Puntos de Dolor', 'Intención Comercial').
Structure the dashboard using the 'Control Room' grid pattern. Every pixel must be utilized with tight gaps.
Ensure 'Nivel de Prioridad' in the tables uses signal colors for High/Medium/Low. E.g., High (Alto) -> #DC2626.
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for macro layouts if Shadcn wrappers restrict strict grid structures.
Apply `data-testid` attributes (kebab-case, role-based) to all interactive elements (buttons, table headers, tabs, list items).
Use JetBrains Mono or a system monospaced font for all numeric data, metric counters, and priority scores.
Do not center-align tables or lists. Maintain left-alignment for scannability.
Implement real-time research progress indicators with a clean, linear progress bar or minimal spinner without overwhelming the UI.
